title: Sombrius's Platforms
description: A simple mod that adds two different types of platforms to help players in their building endeavors.
body:
Mortius' Platforms is a simple mod that adds two different types of platforms to help players in their building endeavors.
______________________________________
Platforms are blocks that when placed, create a 3x3 base to make putting scaffolding to build easier. When destroyed, all of the blocks in a 3x3 area are also broken. They can be broken by hand or with an axe to instantly mine them.

![Platform Recipe](https://i.postimg.cc/Gpkhtcch/platform-recipe.png)
______________________________________
Pillar Platforms will place a small pillar instantly when placed. If the player is sneaking, they will be teleported on top of the pillar. Like regular platforms, they will all break instantly when one block is broken.

![Pillar Platform Recipe](https://i.postimg.cc/7hQqdhNX/pillar-platform-recipe.png)
______________________________________
A new keybind called ''Place One Platform'' allows the player to place only one platform block at a time. When sneaking, the player can break one platform at a time instead of breaking all of them at once.
______________________________________
![Platforms being placed](https://i.postimg.cc/wTZ6ktMj/platform-gif.gif)
